name: Troy-Bilt - Snow Campaign (MARC 2021 microsite)
notes: Responsive *page* shell (header, centered 300×600 game, footer) from https://github.com/BannerWave-LLC/MARC_Troybilt_SnowGame_site — ad unit is still 300×600; height 800 here fits shell in /p/ iframe. Reuses same assets/animation as troybilt-snow-campaign-cleanup-300x600. GTM omitted.

name: Troy-Bilt - Overtested game (responsive 600×600)
notes: Grabb: troy_bilt_game_responsive-600x600. Portrait: durability img centered → score → Overtest (endframe-text3 sprite) → video → black CTA. preview-endframe-panels.js. animation.min.js. preview-resize-boot.js. Vendors: createjs, tweenmax, _ios-host-scroll-lock.
